title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
